title: Bridge Essay: Interoception and alcohol: Mechanisms, networks, and implications.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Body-energy** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Interoception — visceral perception, cardiac interoception, insula, vagal signaling, felt aliveness.

**Interoception and alcohol: Mechanisms, networks, and implications.**. Neuropharmacology.. PMID: 34562442. DOI: 10.1016/j.neuropharm.2021.108807. Interoception refers to the perception of the internal state of the body and is increasingly being recognized as an important factor in mental health disorders. Drugs of abuse produce powerful interoceptive states that are upstream of behaviors that drive and influence drug intake, and addiction pathology is impacted by interoceptive processes.
